0.body:
[ff0000]If things don't appear to be updating, clear your cache. Either disable mod caching in game via settings, or go to the following folder and delete its contents:

WINDOWS
Documents\My Games\Tabletop Simulator\Mods
MAC
Library/Tabletop Simulator/Mods
LINUX
.local/share/Tabletop Simulator/Mods

You will then need to restart your game.[-]

[ffffff][u]Feb 14 2026 | v2.5.1 - With Love[/u]
* Tidied up Notebook, re-added recipes
* Cleaned Crafting Repo in the back
* Found Google Drive stragglers, old yeller'd 'em
* Updated corner note design
* Some back-end fixes and optimizations
* Removed $1 and $727 chips
* Remember the deck I promised like 8 months ago? Hi I did it finally :)

[-][u]Oct 19 2025 | v2.5.0 - Growth[/u]
[sup]All drawings previously on the table have been archived. However, they are not lost, and I can retrieve them on request.[/sup]
[b]* Transitioned framework from Google Drive to GitHub. This should make future updates much easier.[/b]
* Recreated MOST assets
* Slight essence color tweaks
* Lighting modified to be more vibrant
* Custom 3D models are now in game!
    > My goal is to replace all default assets.
* Added the 1 and 727 chips
* Optimization attempts
* Shops have been rebalanced
* Extensions no longer require the base edition
* Added 1 new perk
* 1 perk edit (Collection buff)
* 9 Grass PUs
* Books have been slightly tinted to create visual contrast and differentiation.
* Tags have been better utilized for snapping points.

[u]Jul 27 2025 | v7.2.7[/u]
* Sprinkling some Lore <3
* Up to 15 players can now participate
* Changed Lotto function - See Notebook
* Fixed formula changes in directories
* Finally published the books
* Background has been updated

[u]Jul 12 2025 | v2.4.2 - Beauty Pt. 2[/u]
* Notebook and published books have been redesigned.
* Crafting Flowers are now symmetrical.
* Stone designs updated.
* 1/2 and 3/2 powerup updated to match the Dark Souls rebalance. It is now the last card instead of any card.

[u]Jul 5 2025 | v2.4.1 - Beauty Pt. 1[/u]
* New Perk - Stupidity
* Perk Design Updates
* Several perks have been rebalanced.
[sup]Fighter, Firestarter, Bankruptcy Empire, Perk[/sup]

[u]Jun 28 2025 | v2.4.0 - Dark Souls[/u]
* Soul Powerups have been added
* Some PUs have updated designs
[sup](notably to remove the issue of Holes)[/sup]
* Trash Can & Robbery now only target the Final card
* Other misc. new powerups have been added
* A little routine maintenance, stuff you likely won't notice

[u]Jun 22 2025 | v2.3.3 - Ew Change[/u]
* Soul Essences can now be obtained (There are not any powerups yet at the moment with them).
* Added the Crafting Cheatsheet.
* Powerups now display when they can be used in the description. (Currently possessed PUs not affected)
* Chip Design Updated
* New Players now start with 3 of each Basic Essence.

[u]Jun 14 2025 | v2.3.2 - QOL[/u]
* Lots of scripting :(
* Chip stacks now show sum value
* All chips in a player's public space are summed as well
* Prettied up the side board
* Recovered the Wind Stone I deleted :^)

[u]May 12 2025 | v2.3.1 - Forgive Me[/u]
* Actions between hitting 1000 and obtaining a Log Token are no longer allowed.
* Lottery odds have been tweaked.
> Lower $100 and Garbage
> Higher Pull and Try Again

[u]May 4 2025 | v2.3.0 - Pikachu[/u]
* Added 9 new powerups, including [f5ab41]Thunder[-] powerups.
* Mega Essences are now Tradable.
* Buffed natural card tricks beyond 5.
* Added Achievement Coins (currently unobtainable)
* Added Gold Belt Shop
* Updated Force Water sprite
PLANNED: Deck Design Update
PLANNED: Adding Achievements

[u]Apr 19 2025 | v2.2.1 - Routine Maintenance[/u]
* Added objects into the background
* Perk Reworks
> Stinky Money: All-In lets you use any PU as shield
> WYSI: If anyone gets a natural 7-2-7, gain a Log Token.

[u]Apr 5 2025 | v2.2.0 - Graphic Passion[/u]
* Ported and designed the notebook into an open PDF given to every player
* New art for every powerup
* New table :)
* Added a new script :(
* Tweaked shop prices
* Massive performance boosts it seems

[u]Mar 15 2025 | v2.1.5 - Perkeo[/u]
* Added new 4-essence powerups, including [a1cdfb]Ice[-] powerups
* Added a buyable Page Extension for [i]Counting to 4[/i]
* Reworked 6 Perks (Players can choose to redraw their perk if they wish.)

[u]Mar 1 2025 | v2.1.4 - ... and Better![/u]
* Added the Brown seat
[s]* First turn is now cyclical[/s] no this is too hard
* New deck!!
* Updated Background

[u]Feb 14 2025 | v2.1.3 - Articulation[/u]
* Renamed "Lottery 2" to Scratch Tickets
* Tweaked scratch prize odds

[u]4 Feb 2025 | v2.1.2 - Lottery 2!!![/u]
* Added a lottery card [sup]different from the other lotto![/sup]

[u]2 Feb 2025 | v2.1.1 - The Blackjack Store[/u]
* Background has been updated
* The White Belt Shop has been added
* I wrote a book lmao
* Added the Lottery Machine
* Tweaked game lighting and ambience

[u]25 Jan 2025 | v2.1.0 - Frosty[/u]
* 3-Essence [a1cdfb]Ice[-] powerups have been added
* The Dealer can now play Powerups
* Tweaked some Perks
* Defined the Rules of adding Recipes to Notebook
* Rebranded the Bounty Page to the PvP page in NB, added more information.
* Background has been updated
* Did some general aesthetic improvements
* Hands have been re-added. You can hold PUs and Essences in your hands. (I sorted everyone's bags to toggle hands on objects)

[u]20 Jan 2025 | v2.0.2 - We Love Log Tokens[/u]
* Preparations for undiscovered features
[sup]> Hint: It has to do with log tokens[/sup]
* New Background [sup](pls appreciate it, it looks really nice)[/sup]
* Force Water now has limitations on its use. [sup](y'all are directly threatening me and I am responding lmao)[/sup]
* Added recipe for [ff645c]Fr[-] [-]and [668770]Wd[-] [-]so that all combinations now exist.

[u]18 Jan 2025 | v2.0.1 - Hotfix[/u]
* Added alternative formulas for some powerups to reduce garbage.
* 3 Garbage is now a crafting formula. What it does is a mystery.
* Bankruptcy now means you pull garbage instead of a proper pull.

[u]7 Jan 2025 | v2.0 - Initial Release[/u]
* 11 powerups, 10 returning and 1 new.
* Powerup system reworked entirely. 
* Added new Crafting system.
* Prestige/Ascension system reworked entirely.
* Payouts have been nerfed dramatically to prevent accelerated progress.
* Soundtrack expanded

local pull = getObjectFromGUID("3037ac")
local t = pull.getValue()

function onLoad()
    tick()
end

function tick()
    t = pull.getValue()
    if t > 0 then
        self.setValue(t)
    end
    Wait.time(tick, 0.1)
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
local num = -1
local chipValue = 5
local stackValue = chipValue

function onLoad()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onSpawn()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onHover()
    num = self.getQuantity()
    if num > 0 then
        stackValue = chipValue * num
        self.setName("$"..chipValue.." = $"..stackValue)
    else
        num = 1
        stackValue = chipValue
        self.setName("$"..chipValue)
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(o)
    local check = o.collision_object.getGMNotes()
    if check == self.getGMNotes() then
        o.collision_object.setName(self.getName())
        self.putObject(o.collision_object)
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Model_Infinite_Bag
ObjectStates.Description:
[-]Price increments + base each attempt. Resets to base after each hand.
Base: $25 OR 1 Garbage
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
local spin = 0
local offset = 0
local spinSpeed = 0.25
local offSize = 0.5
local sine = 180.0 / math.pi
local baseX = -20
local baseY = 2.5
local baseZ = 22

function onLoad()
    self.setLock(true)
    self.setPosition({baseX, baseY, baseZ})
end

function onFixedUpdate()
    self.setRotation({0, spin, 0})
    self.setPosition({baseX, baseY+offset, baseZ})
    spin = (spin - spinSpeed) % 360
    offset = math.sin(spin / sine) * offSize
end

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Tile_Stack
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
local num = -1
local chipValue = 5
local stackValue = chipValue

function onLoad()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onSpawn()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onHover()
    num = self.getQuantity()
    if num > 0 then
        stackValue = chipValue * num
        self.setName("$"..chipValue.." = $"..stackValue)
    else
        num = 1
        stackValue = chipValue
        self.setName("$"..chipValue)
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(o)
    local check = o.collision_object.getGMNotes()
    if check == self.getGMNotes() then
        o.collision_object.setName(self.getName())
        self.putObject(o.collision_object)
    end
end

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Tile_Stack
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
local num = -1
local chipValue = 10
local stackValue = chipValue

function onLoad()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onSpawn()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onHover()
    num = self.getQuantity()
    if num > 0 then
        stackValue = chipValue * num
        self.setName("$"..chipValue.." = $"..stackValue)
    else
        num = 1
        stackValue = chipValue
        self.setName("$"..chipValue)
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(o)
    local check = o.collision_object.getGMNotes()
    if check == self.getGMNotes() then
        o.collision_object.setName(self.getName())
        self.putObject(o.collision_object)
    end
end

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Tile
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
local num = -1
local chipValue = 10
local stackValue = chipValue

function onLoad()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onSpawn()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onHover()
    num = self.getQuantity()
    if num > 0 then
        stackValue = chipValue * num
        self.setName("$"..chipValue.." = $"..stackValue)
    else
        num = 1
        stackValue = chipValue
        self.setName("$"..chipValue)
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(o)
    local check = o.collision_object.getGMNotes()
    if check == self.getGMNotes() then
        o.collision_object.setName(self.getName())
        self.putObject(o.collision_object)
    end
end

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Tile_Stack
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
local num = -1
local chipValue = 25
local stackValue = chipValue

function onLoad()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onSpawn()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onHover()
    num = self.getQuantity()
    if num > 0 then
        stackValue = chipValue * num
        self.setName("$"..chipValue.." = $"..stackValue)
    else
        num = 1
        stackValue = chipValue
        self.setName("$"..chipValue)
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(o)
    local check = o.collision_object.getGMNotes()
    if check == self.getGMNotes() then
        o.collision_object.setName(self.getName())
        self.putObject(o.collision_object)
    end
end

ContainedObjects.Name: Custom_Tile_Stack
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
local num = -1
local chipValue = 5
local stackValue = chipValue

function onLoad()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onSpawn()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onHover()
    num = self.getQuantity()
    if num > 0 then
        stackValue = chipValue * num
        self.setName("$"..chipValue.." = $"..stackValue)
    else
        num = 1
        stackValue = chipValue
        self.setName("$"..chipValue)
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(o)
    local check = o.collision_object.getGMNotes()
    if check == self.getGMNotes() then
        o.collision_object.setName(self.getName())
        self.putObject(o.collision_object)
    end
end

ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
local num = -1
local chipValue = 100
local stackValue = chipValue

function onLoad()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onSpawn()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onHover()
    num = self.getQuantity()
    if num > 0 then
        stackValue = chipValue * num
        self.setName("$"..chipValue.." = $"..stackValue)
    else
        num = 1
        stackValue = chipValue
        self.setName("$"..chipValue)
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(o)
    local check = o.collision_object.getGMNotes()
    if check == self.getGMNotes() then
        o.collision_object.setName(self.getName())
        self.putObject(o.collision_object)
    end
end

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
local count = getObjectFromGUID("9d907b")
local sum = 0

function onLoad()
    Wait.time(tick, 1)
end

function updateSum()
    count.setValue(sum)
end

function tick()
    sum = 0
    for _, o in ipairs(self.getObjects()) do
        sum = sum + (o.getGMNotes() * math.abs(o.getQuantity()))
    end
    updateSum()
    Wait.time(tick, 1)
end

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
local health = 0.0
local maxHealth = 1.0
local percent = 0
local redd = 0

function onLoad()
    self.addContextMenuItem("Update HP", newHealth)
end

function newHealth()
    health = self.getDescription()
    maxHealth = self.getGMNotes()
    percent = health / maxHealth
    if percent >= 1.0 then
        self.setColorTint({0,0,0})
    elseif percent >= 0.75 then
        self.setColorTint({0.5,0.25,0})
    elseif percent >= 0.5 then
        self.setColorTint({1,1,0})
    else
        self.setColorTint({0,.75,1})
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
local num = -1
local chipValue = 100
local stackValue = chipValue

function onLoad()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onSpawn()
    self.setGMNotes(chipValue)
end

function onHover()
    num = self.getQuantity()
    if num > 0 then
        stackValue = chipValue * num
        self.setName("$"..chipValue.." = $"..stackValue)
    else
        num = 1
        stackValue = chipValue
        self.setName("$"..chipValue)
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(o)
    local check = o.collision_object.getGMNotes()
    if check == self.getGMNotes() then
        o.collision_object.setName(self.getName())
        self.putObject(o.collision_object)
    end
end
